授業の概要・背景: This course will examine the current problems surrounding social media. We will examine the roles played by government, social media platforms, and users of social media. This course will enable students to engage in discussions around this issue so that, if students study abroad, they will  be able to understand and engage in this topic that is currently very common in many countries around the world. This class would also be helpful for students considering TOEFL or IELTS tests.

第1回:
1. Students will write a report on this issue for the final class.
2. Students will engage in a discussion on their reports in the final class.
3. Students will complete a vocabulary worksheet based on Flex Hour videos.
This work is to be completed by the final class.
